Falcom announces Dragon Slayer Project for console - Gematsu
articles.description: Falcom has announced Dragon Slayer Project, its tentatively titled 45th anniversary project for console. A genre, specific platforms, and a release date were not announced.

articles.title: OnePlus 15T: Official first look at new compact flagship phone revealed - Notebookcheck
articles.description: The successor to last year's OnePlus 13T is confirmed to launch soon in China. The OnePlus 15T has been officially revealed in two colorways, with a design language that closely resembles the standard OnePlus 15 and the 13T.
